subtitles.original: きっと先は深くて不安定
subtitles.english: I'm sure the path ahead is deep and unstable,

subtitles.original: でもお行儀良くちゃつまんないね
subtitles.english: but playing by the rules is just boring.

subtitles.original: タイムマシンに乗り込んで
subtitles.english: Hop on the time machine

subtitles.original: トラベラーになれたら
subtitles.english: and if we could become travelers...

subtitles.original: Done
subtitles.english: Done.

subtitles.original: yo シボレーのドアを蹴り開けて
subtitles.english: Yo, kicking open the Chevrolet door,

subtitles.original: 街に飛び出した俺たち
subtitles.english: we leaped out into the city streets.

subtitles.original: 暴力 酒に女 音楽
subtitles.english: Violence, alcohol, women, music...

subtitles.original: 中指立てる大人の仮面に
subtitles.english: flipping the bird to the masks of adults.

subtitles.original: Oh さぁ踊ろう 「今日」という日を
subtitles.english: Oh, come on, let's dance, taking "today"...

subtitles.original: 生き急ぐメンバー
subtitles.english: ...with the crew living life in the fast lane.

subtitles.original: 足りねぇか？ Little louder!
subtitles.english: Not enough? Little louder!

subtitles.original: 欲望渦巻く路上が現場
subtitles.english: The desire-swirling streets are our stage.

subtitles.original: Yeah いつだってそうだろう？
subtitles.english: Yeah, it's always been that way, right?

subtitles.original: ブルハ 尾崎 永ちゃんが教科書
subtitles.english: The Blue Hearts, Ozaki, and Yazawa were our textbooks.

subtitles.original: くたばるまで格好つけてぇ
subtitles.english: We wanna look cool until the day we die.

subtitles.original: 誓ったよあの放課後
subtitles.english: We made that vow after school.

subtitles.original: 俺らピーターパン
subtitles.english: We are Peter Pans.

subtitles.original: 「またいつか」なんて言っちゃいかん
subtitles.english: We can't just say "maybe someday."

subtitles.original: 嘲笑っとる大人に言ってやるぁ
subtitles.english: We'll show those sneering adults

subtitles.original: 人生はたったの一回だ
subtitles.english: that you only get one shot at life.

subtitles.original: 胸の奥底 初期衝動
subtitles.english: Deep in our hearts, that primal urge...

subtitles.original: 見て見ぬフリ No, No
subtitles.english: ...we won't turn a blind eye, no, no.

subtitles.original: 夢追い笑われ
subtitles.english: Mocked for chasing dreams,

subtitles.original: 傷だらけでギラつく My way
subtitles.english: covered in scars, shining on my way.

subtitles.original: Go on! You should know
subtitles.english: Go on! You should know

subtitles.original: who we are
subtitles.english: who we are...

subtitles.original: Forever Young
subtitles.english: Forever Young!

subtitles.original: Hey! Just next to me from now
subtitles.english: Hey! Just next to me from now.

subtitles.original: 大切なことは
subtitles.english: What matters most...

subtitles.original: 魂の状態
subtitles.english: ...is the state of your soul.

subtitles.original: Forever Young
subtitles.english: Forever Young!

subtitles.original: Hey! It's your turn next time from here
subtitles.english: Hey! It's your turn next time from here.

subtitles.original: 「あの日始めれば良かった」
subtitles.english: "I wish I had started that day."

subtitles.original: その次の
subtitles.english: The next best time...

subtitles.original: 始めるべき時は今
subtitles.english: ...to start is right now!

subtitles.original: 高笑いする都会の喧騒
subtitles.english: The roaring laughter of the city's bustle,

subtitles.original: ウケ狙いならば振り向けんぞ
subtitles.english: if you're just seeking attention, I won't look back.

subtitles.original: 何連呼？ 忘れろ？ 夢流した便所
subtitles.english: Repeating what? Forget it? The toilet where dreams were flushed,

subtitles.original: 見下ろしてきやがる摩天楼
subtitles.english: with skyscrapers looking down on us.

subtitles.original: Oh まるで勝新みたく破天荒
subtitles.english: Oh, wild and reckless like Shintaro Katsu,

subtitles.original: 伝説へとアテンド
subtitles.english: attending to our legendary path.

subtitles.original: 怖にゃあ怖にゃあってその程度
subtitles.english: Cowering "I'm scared, I'm scared" — is that all you've got?

subtitles.original: 捨てろ負け惜しみ 過去の栄光
subtitles.english: Throw away your sour grapes and past glory.

subtitles.original: 永遠なんぞはねぇて
subtitles.english: There is no such thing as eternity,

subtitles.original: いつか天へ召され
subtitles.english: one day we'll be called to heaven.

subtitles.original: ペンの書き殴ったこの魂は2PACみたく
subtitles.english: This soul scribbled in pen, like 2Pac's,

subtitles.original: 誰かの心を通過
subtitles.english: will pass through someone's heart.

subtitles.original: なぁ 何か忘れちゃねぇか
subtitles.english: Hey, haven't we forgotten something?

subtitles.original: 人生まるで映画 皆がエンターテイナー
subtitles.english: Life is like a movie, everyone's an entertainer.

subtitles.original: 思い出せ思想は現実化する
subtitles.english: Remember, thoughts manifest into reality.

subtitles.original: 誰がHighway飛ばすBentayga
subtitles.english: Who's speeding down the highway in a Bentayga?

subtitles.original: 胸の奥底 初期衝動
subtitles.english: Deep in our hearts, that primal urge...

subtitles.original: 見て見ぬフリ No, No
subtitles.english: ...we won't turn a blind eye, no, no.

subtitles.original: 夢追い笑われ
subtitles.english: Mocked for chasing dreams,

subtitles.original: 傷だらけでギラつく My way
subtitles.english: covered in scars, shining on my way.

subtitles.original: Go on! You should know
subtitles.english: Go on! You should know

subtitles.original: who we are
subtitles.english: who we are...

subtitles.original: Forever Young
subtitles.english: Forever Young!

subtitles.original: Hey! 俺たちは今日だって
subtitles.english: Hey! Even today, we are...

subtitles.original: 若気の至りのような
subtitles.english: ...still chasing dreams

subtitles.original: 夢を追いかけて来た
subtitles.english: like the folly of youth.

subtitles.original: Forever Young
subtitles.english: Forever Young!

subtitles.original: Hey! 変わるはずなんてない
subtitles.english: Hey! There's no way we're changing.

subtitles.original: さぁ至ってやろうぜ！
subtitles.english: Come on, let's reach the top!

subtitles.original: 今日は残された人生で
subtitles.english: Today is, of the life we have left...

subtitles.original: 一番若い日だろ
subtitles.english: ...the youngest day, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 半端な覚悟ならドブに捨てな
subtitles.english: If your resolve is half-hearted, throw it in the gutter!

subtitles.original: 往生際が悪いテメー笑い飛ばし
subtitles.english: Laughing off your bad grace,

subtitles.original: 誇れ Better days
subtitles.english: take pride in better days!

subtitles.original: まだ終わらない
subtitles.english: It's not over yet,

subtitles.original: 終わらせやしない 燃え尽きるまで保存
subtitles.english: we won't let it end until we burn out!

subtitles.original: まだ終わらない保存
subtitles.english: It's not over yet,

subtitles.original: 終わらせやしない くたばるまで保存
subtitles.english: we won't let it end until we die!

subtitles.original: Forever Young
subtitles.english: Forever Young!

subtitles.original: もう夢を追いかけ本気になった心は
subtitles.english: A heart that got serious about chasing dreams...

subtitles.original: 自分の指図も受けない
subtitles.english: ...won't even take orders from itself.保存

subtitles.original: Forever Young
subtitles.english: Forever Young!

subtitles.original: Hey! その思いから逃れられないなら
subtitles.english: Hey! If you can't escape those feelings...保存

subtitles.original: 自ら向かうだけ
subtitles.english: ...then just face them yourself.

subtitles.original: 終わらせやしない
subtitles.english: We won't let it end,

subtitles.original: 燃え尽きるまで
subtitles.english: until we burn out!

subtitles.original: まだ終わらない
subtitles.english: It's not over yet,

subtitles.original: 終わらせやしない くたばるまで
subtitles.english: we won't let it end until we die!

subtitles.original: まだ終わらない まだ終わらない
subtitles.english: It's not over yet, it's not over yet...

subtitles.original: Forever Young
subtitles.english: Forever Young!

subtitles.original: そう今日という日は
subtitles.english: Yes, today is...

subtitles.original: お前に残された人生の一番若い日
subtitles.english: ...the youngest day of the rest of your life.

subtitles.original: マリン、来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Marine, thank you so much for coming!

subtitles.original: 呼んでくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you for inviting me!

subtitles.original: いや、マジこの「Forever Young」って曲をマリンと一緒に歌いたかったの！「Forever Young」って曲をね。
subtitles.english: No, really, I seriously wanted to sing this song "Forever Young" with Marine!

subtitles.original: ああ、それはマリンがおばさんにならないように？
subtitles.english: Ah, is that so Marine doesn't become an old lady?

subtitles.original: そう！もうフォーエバーのヤングでいようねっていうね！
subtitles.english: Exactly! Like, "let's stay forever young," you know!

subtitles.original: そうだね、永遠にヤングでいましょう、みんな、みんな、フォーエバーヤングで！
subtitles.english: That's right, let's stay forever young, everyone!
